description: Calculate the safe Swing Circle radius for the vessel 'MV OOCL United Kingdom' using the data in '~/Documents/AnchorData/vessel_status.txt'. Create a Bridge Command scenario named 'a) Anchor Watch Drill' in the Solent environment with the ship at the specified anchor position. Place 8 marker buoys on the swing circle perimeter at 45-degree intervals (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW). Save the calculated radius in meters to '~/Documents/AnchorData/anchor_orders.txt'.
